abilities.name: water-veil
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be burned. If a Pokémon is burned and acquires this ability, its burn is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's water veil prevents it from being burned.

abilities.name: oblivious
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to Captivate. If a Pokémon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: pressure
abilities.shortEffect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
abilities.effect: Moves targetting this Pokémon use one extra PP. This ability stacks if multiple targets have it. This ability still affects moves that fail or miss. This ability does not affect ally moves that target either the entire field or just its side, nor this Pokémon's self-targetted moves; it does, however, affect single-targetted ally moves aimed at this Pokémon, ally moves that target all other Pokémon, and opponents' moves that target the entire field. If this ability raises a move's PP cost above its remaining PP, it will use all remaining PP. When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
abilities.flavorText: Puts other Pokémon under pressure, causing them to expend more PP to use their moves.
